query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.status,
  p.dataOrigin,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.createdAt
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN (1290001, 1260001, 390001, 1170002, 540001, 1170001)
ORDER BY p.id DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.status,
  p.dataOrigin,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.createdAt
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN (1290001, 1260001, 390001, 1170002, 540001, 1170001)
ORDER BY p.id DESC;
